subject: Social Science (Economics)
overall_learning_objectives: Critically analyse the concept of development from multiple perspectives
Evaluate limitations of income as a development indicator
Interpret real-world data related to HDI and per capita income
Compare regional and international development indicators
Examine sustainability challenges in economic growth
Develop analytical and case-based reasoning skills

lesson_plan.title: Critical Understanding of Development
teaching_strategy: Case study analysis (industrial project vs environmental protection)

lesson_plan.title: Income, Inequality and Development
topics_covered: National income vs per capita income
Limitations of income as sole measure
student_activities: Calculate per capita income from dataset
Analyse inequality using simple comparison chart

lesson_plan.title: Human Development Index (HDI) – Analytical Approach
teaching_strategy: Comparative analysis (India vs Sri Lanka vs USA)
student_activities: Write short justification: Which country is more developed and why?

lesson_plan.title: Public Facilities and Role of Government
student_activities: Prepare short presentation on importance of public healthcare

lesson_plan.title: Sustainable Development – Long-Term Perspective
student_activities: Prepare conservation plan for a village
Identify long-term consequences of overuse of resources

lesson_plan.title: Integrated Case-Based Revision and Assessment
student_activities: Write a short essay: 'Is economic growth equal to development?'

teacher_tip: Encourage higher-order thinking by using real data, debates, and case studies. Focus on helping students differentiate between economic growth and holistic development.
